examples: The man wore a straw boater and a striped blazer which bulged over his paunch.
She is happily married to her husband Joe, a business executive and avid boater.
There is also an intriguing outside mural - drawn by some bored German soldier - of a man in a boater hat smoking a pipe.
And you will likely be the only boater.
Allen had bought him a Styrofoam straw boater.
